workspace.blocksDescription: Choose which details each tab shows.
workspace.statusTrackingDescription: Installs a Claude Code hook so cards show live status (running, thinking, needs approval) only while Claude runs in a tempo-term terminal. Other terminals are unaffected.
workspace.notificationsLabel: Desktop notification when an agent needs approval or finishes (only while the window is unfocused)
workspace.notificationsRequiresTracking: Turn on session-status tracking to enable notifications.
workspace.launcherFlagsDescription: Flags added to the command when you start Claude Code or Codex from the launcher.
workspace.prDescription: Where PR status is fetched from. gh is detected automatically.
workspace.ghMissing: gh CLI not found on PATH

about.tagline: AI-powered terminal, editor and file explorer

language.label: Display language
language.description: Choose the language used across the interface

fonts.label: Terminal font
fonts.description: Pick the primary monospace font; a Traditional Chinese fallback is applied automatically
fonts.iconFontHint: Optional Nerd Font / Powerline font used to render icon glyphs the primary font lacks
fonts.previewText: The quick brown fox 中文字體預覽 0123

terminalSettings.description: Adjust the gap between the terminal content and its pane edges
terminalSettings.restoreHistoryHint: Reopen each terminal with its previous output (read-only), unless its shell was exited or the pane was closed
terminalSettings.suggestionsHint: Show a dim completion from your shell history as you type; press → to accept
terminalSettings.actionLinksHint: Hover an IP, host:port or archive in the output to get quick commands (ping, curl, extract…)
terminalSettings.customShellHint: Shell executable to spawn instead of the auto-detected default; leave empty for your system $SHELL, or point at pwsh / PowerShell 7 on Windows

aiModel.label: Default model
aiModel.description: Choose the provider and model the assistant uses by default; you can switch anytime in the chat panel

aiInline.label: Inline code completion
aiInline.description: Show AI ghost-text suggestions while typing in the editor. Tab accepts, Escape dismisses. Uses your default model and counts against its usage.

aiKeys.title: API keys
aiKeys.description: Keys are stored in your OS keychain and read only by the backend, never returned to the app window
